description: Identify gaps between required competencies and current skill/certification levels across the workforce, focusing on talent management and capability readiness.

transformations: map required competencies to current workforce proficiency
compute skill_gap_delta = required_level - current_level per competency
rank gaps by business impact (critical roles first)

cce_config.uses: competency-gap framing — identify which training investments most efficiently close skill gaps

recommender_instructions.metric_selection_bias: prefer metrics related to skills, competencies, certifications, and talent management; deprioritize generic compliance metrics
recommender_instructions.output_guidance: each recommended metric should focus on the delta between required and actual competency levels; include role/function context where available
recommender_instructions.causal_usage: optional — use causal edges to identify which training programs most effectively close specific skill gaps

penalty_rules: penalize metrics unrelated to skills or competency tracking (-0.15)
penalize metrics with no role/function context (-0.05)
boost_rules: boost metrics that directly measure competency or skill levels (+0.10)
boost metrics tied to certification programs (+0.08)
boost metrics in the talent_management focus area (+0.05)
